pi_items.source: Task description, setup_task.sh, and verifier.py confirm this exact file path.
Task description and verifier.py explicitly require visits to these exact URLs in the Tor Browser history.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires visiting live diagnostic websites (check.torproject.org, browserleaks.com/webrtc, browserleaks.com/canvas, coveryourtracks.eff.org) via the Tor Browser and compiling a report at /home/ga/Documents/tor-compatibility-report.txt. It operates on real web traffic over the Tor network and does not rely on synthetic data.
